title: Show HN: Apple's SHARP running in the browser via ONNX runtime web
description: Hi HN, author here. SHARP is Apple's recent single-image 3D Gaussian splatting model ( https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.10685 ). Their reference code is PyTorch + a pretty heavy pipeline; I wanted to see if it could run in a browser with no server hop, so I exported the predictor to ONNX and ran it via onnxruntime-web with the WebGPU EP. What works: drop in an image, get a .ply you can download or preview live, all on your machine — your image never leaves the tab. The model is large (~2.4 GB sidecar)
